statement: In every magma, Equation 251 (`x = (y * (z * w)) * y`) implies Equation 3496 (`x * x = y * ((z * y) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0605
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z w)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op y (op (op z y) y))
